title: Boardwalk Repairs Complete on the North Trail
body: The stretch of boardwalk near the bird-watching deck has been resurfaced and is now open to all visitors. Please continue to walk single-file in this section during high tide.

title: Earth Day Mangrove Planting Drive
body: Over 60 volunteers from Barangay 6-A joined this year's planting drive, adding 200 new Rhizophora seedlings along the eastern nursery bed.

title: New Cottage Hours for the Dry Season
body: From March to May, cottages are open for booking from 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM to make the most of cooler trail conditions.
